programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E8 The life of Geet, a village girl, takes a tragic turn when her NRI husband abandons her. Subsequently, she travels to the city and takes up a job.
programme.title: Geet-Hui Sabse Parayi

programme.desc: S1 E77 Kinjal grows stressed as the blackmailer starts turning up the heat on her. An idea pops into her head the moment she sees a precious jewellery set in Kokila's hands.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.desc: S1 E160 Shivprasad lives a quiet life as a devoted husband and father, but he harbors a massive secret. Unknown to his family, he is also Parshuram, a highly skilled spy on dangerous missions.
programme.title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram

programme.desc: S1 E43 Single mother Dr. Noyonika helps pop star sensation Ishaan regain his voice, to the delight of her daughter. But tensions rise as they fall for each other.
programme.title: Sairaab

programme.desc: S1 E85 A reserved businessman who avoids romance crosses paths with an artist haunted by a bitter past, leaving the prospect of a budding romance hanging in the balance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera

programme.desc: S1 E853 Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.
programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha

programme.desc: S1 E5223 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
